languages.text: "Где Ведка и Батошски когда Клеть атакуют?"
"Where were Dunawski and Batoshski while the Cage was under attack?"
languages.original_text: "Где Ведка и Батошски когда Клеть атакуют?"

traits.locale_text: "Where are Vedka and Batoshski while the Cage is under attack?"
"Where are Vedka and Batoshski while the Cage is under attack?"
"Where were Dunawski and Batoshski while the Cage was under attack?"
"Where were Dunawski and Batoshski while the Cage was under attack?"

languages.text: “牢笼遭到攻击时，杜纳芙斯卡基和巴托什斯基在哪儿？”
languages.original_text: "Where were Dunawski and Batoshski while the Cage was under attack?"

traits.locale_text: “牢笼遭到攻击时，杜纳芙斯卡基和巴托什斯基在哪儿？”

languages.text: "Kafes saldırı altındayken Dunawski ve Batoshski neredeydi?"
languages.original_text: "Where were Dunawski and Batoshski while the Cage was under attack?"

traits.locale_text: "Kafes saldırı altındayken Dunawski ve Batoshski neredeydi?"

languages.text: « Où étaient Dunawski et Batoshski pendant l'attaque de la Cage ? »
languages.original_text: "Where were Dunawski and Batoshski while the Cage was under attack?"

traits.locale_text: « Où étaient Dunawski et Batoshski pendant l'attaque de la Cage ? »

languages.text: «¿Dónde estaban Dunawski y Batoshski mientras la Jaula estaba bajo asedio?».
languages.original_text: "Where were Dunawski and Batoshski while the Cage was under attack?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Dónde estaban Dunawski y Batoshski mientras la Jaula estaba bajo asedio?».

languages.text: "Wo waren Dunawski und Batoshski, als der Käfig angegriffen wurde?"
languages.original_text: "Where were Dunawski and Batoshski while the Cage was under attack?"

traits.locale_text: "Wo waren Dunawski und Batoshski, als der Käfig angegriffen wurde?"

languages.text: 「ケージが攻撃されている間、ダナウスキとバトシウスキはどこにいたのですか？」
languages.original_text: "Where were Dunawski and Batoshski while the Cage was under attack?"

traits.locale_text: 「ケージが攻撃されている間、ダナウスキとバトシウスキはどこにいたのですか？」
